info.title: Patent Information Retrieval APIs
info.description: Server URL ： https://ip-data.jpo.go.jp/api To retrieve information in response to the parameters defined. *Note: "try it out" buttons in the specification pages are not available. *Note: To maintain stable operation, the provision of information via the Patent Information Retrieval APIs is regulated by access limits.

parameters.name: application number
parameters.description: Gregorian calendar year (4 digits)+0 padding (6 digits)

200.description:
Listed below are the API status codes to be configured if HTTP status code is 200:

Characters encoded in UTF8.

Returns the followings in json format.

* Status code in accordance with processing results.

* Error message in case of an error.

* Remaining number of accesses available.

* Detailed information data (object containing retrieved progress information)

*Empty object is configured for detailed information data if the result returned is other than successful completion.

Details of status codes, error messages and other details of results to be returned are shown below:

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

◆100：successfully completed

Returned when relevant data is retrieved successfully.

*Regarding the detailed information data to be returned,

* no characters for parameter is configured when there's no value.
* null array is to be configured when there is no value for a parameter that is assumed to have repetition.


◆107：no applicable data found

Occurs when no bibliographic information associated with the requested application number is found.


◆203：exceeded daily access limit

Reached daily access limit to regulate further access.


◆208：Characters impossible to be entered into parameters

Returns when tab characters, "," , ";" and/or"|" are contained in the parameter.


◆999：Unexpected error

Unable to retrieve requested data for some reasons although the server is working properly.

-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

Character specified for schema patterns are character strings of regular expression.

Example: ^[[0-9]]{10}$ ⇒ 10 digits consists of 0 to 9

Retrieves applicant (applicant and/or attorney) code through perfect-matching search of defined applicant name.

Request defines an applicant name as URL parameter.

{applicant name} defined as shown in the example below.

One name to be defined per request.

Possible to retrieve applicant (applicant and/or representatie) code if the name matches perfectly with the desugbated name.

Example：https://ip-data.jpo.go.jp/api/patent/v1/applicant_attorney/特許庁長官

parameters.name: kind code
parameters.description: define 'appliation', 'publication' or 'registration'

parameters.name: registration number
parameters.description:

Application number: 10-letter fixed-length chart (Gregorian calendar year 4 digits + 0-padding patent application number)
